Yu-Gi-Oh! Progression

Prog with the Bois

Home Terms Privacy

Legal

Privacy Policy

Last updated: April 1, 2026

1. Overview

This Privacy Policy explains what information Prog with the Bois may collect, how it is used, and how it is protected.

2. Information We May Collect

Depending on how you use the site, we may collect:

  • basic technical data such as browser, device, and request information;
  • site usage data needed for security, debugging, and performance;
  • Discord account information when you log in for editor/admin features;
  • preferences or settings saved for site functionality.

3. Discord Login Data

If you use Discord login features, the site may receive limited account information such as your Discord user ID, username, avatar, and permission mapping needed for access control.

4. How Information Is Used

Information may be used to:

  • operate and maintain the site;
  • authenticate users for editor or settings pages;
  • store artwork or site preferences;
  • improve stability, security, and performance;
  • respond to abuse or technical issues.

5. Cookies and Session Data

The site may use cookies or session-related storage to keep users logged in, protect authentication flows, and preserve essential functionality.

6. Third-Party Services

The site may rely on third-party providers such as Cloudflare and Discord. Those providers may process data according to their own privacy policies.

7. Data Retention

Data is retained only for as long as reasonably necessary for site operation, security, and functionality, unless a longer retention period is required by law.

8. Data Sharing

We do not sell personal information. Data may be shared only when necessary to run the site, comply with legal obligations, or protect the site and its users.

9. Security

Reasonable measures are used to protect information, but no system can guarantee absolute security.

10. Your Choices

You may choose not to use login-based or editor-related features. If you want data related to your use reviewed or removed where applicable, contact the site owner.

11. Changes to This Policy

This Privacy Policy may be updated from time to time. The latest version will always be posted on this page.

12. Contact

For privacy questions, contact the site owner through the project’s official channels.
